# Raw Tasks (Inbox)
Free-form requests. Each line should be a minimal ask; the Task Creator will structure it.

Template:
- [ ] ID: temp-001 | Title: short phrase | Source: user/agent | Notes: context or link

Rules:
- If an agent is blocked or discovers follow-up work, append a new entry here.
- Keep it terse; details will be expanded by `task-creator.agent`.
